    · dsimp

    exact fun a ↦ ⟨Multiplicative.ofAdd a, rfl⟩,
   fun h ↦ by
    obtain ⟨e⟩ := IsAffine.iso_Spec Γ(G)
    have : Nonempty (Γ(G, ⊤)) := ⟨0⟩
    have : IsDomain (Γ(G, ⊤)) := inferInstance
    have : ∃ (A : Type u) (_ : AddCommGroup A), Γ(G, ⊤) ≃ₐ[R] MonoidAlgebra R (Multiplicative A) := by
      apply MonoidAlgebra.exists_group_basis
      · exact h
      · exact inferInstance
    obtain ⟨A, _, f⟩ := this
    refine ⟨A, ‹_›, (e.symm ≪≫ (Spec.map f.symm).asIso ≪≫ diagSpecIso R A), ?_, ?_⟩
    · dsimp; infer_instance
    · dsimp; infer_instance⟩
